name: Chat & Connection Quality
description: Messaging behavior analysis — match-to-chat conversion, message types, auto-message effectiveness, conversation depth, Instagram/phone sharing signals, chat deletion patterns, and connection quality indicators

name: Music Discovery & Streaming
description: Music engagement analysis — explore page usage, song/track clicks, streaming service playback (Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music), artist room participation, currently-playing behavior, playlist interactions, and music-driven social engagement
